title: Gear up for Two Lagoons Road Race
description: GEORGE NEWS - Cape Multisport Eden will host the Two Lagoons Road Race in Wilderness on Saturday 31 January, offering runners a scenic but challenging route through the area s iconic landscapes.
bodyText:
Journalist
                                    Kristy  Kolberg

GEORGE NEWS - Cape Multisport Eden will host the Two Lagoons Road Race in Wilderness on Saturday 31 January, offering runners a scenic but challenging route through the area’s iconic landscapes.

The race will start and finish at the Libertas Guest Farm (The Dairy) about 10km past Hoekwil on the Seven Passes Road towards Karatara.

Participants may choose between a 30km race starting at 06:30 or a 10km race at 06:45. The route consists of 30% surfaced roads and 70% gravel, and the organisers emphasise that this is not a trail run.

You can also enter at Top Gear Sport in George or at Libertas Guest Farm between 05:30 and 06:15 on race day.

The event will be run under Asa and ASWD rules and timed using an Ipico timing chip, with a reminder that no chip means no time.
